config.description: konflate configuration (the non-secret KONFLATE_* environment variables).

cacheTtl.description: Advanced: prune source-cache entries unused longer than this (Go duration); bare git mirrors are kept. Empty = default (168h/7d); "0" disables the sweep.
cacheTtl.title: cacheTtl

closedPrMax.description: Cap on retained merged PRs (most-recent win); bounds disk + memory. 0 disables the cap (with `closedPrTtl: "0"`, merged diffs are kept forever).
closedPrMax.title: closedPrMax

closedPrTtl.description: How long a merged PR is kept (Go duration); 0 disables the age cap.
closedPrTtl.title: closedPrTtl

clusterPath.description: Directory flate renders from; empty = repo root (correct for the standard root-relative layout).
clusterPath.title: clusterPath

diffTimeout.description: Hard cap on a single PR render end-to-end (Go duration). Empty = default (10m); "0" disables. Lower on untrusted instances.
diffTimeout.title: diffTimeout

extraEnv.description: Extra raw env vars merged into the container (advanced).
extraEnv.title: extraEnv

helmRenderCacheMb.description: Advanced: persistent on-disk Helm render cache in MiB, reused across renders/PRs/restarts. Empty = default (1024); "0" disables.
helmRenderCacheMb.title: helmRenderCacheMb

helmTemplateCacheMb.description: Advanced: in-memory Helm template cache in MiB (the biggest CPU saver). Empty = auto (256 ÷ render concurrency, so it doesn't scale with the CPU limit); "0" disables.
helmTemplateCacheMb.title: helmTemplateCacheMb

logLevel.description: Log level: debug, info, warn, or error.
logLevel.title: logLevel

maxDiffConcurrency.description: Max concurrent diff renders; 0 = auto (from the CPU limit, capped at 4).
maxDiffConcurrency.title: maxDiffConcurrency

maxDiffResources.description: Cap on resources fully rendered per diff (each carries highlighted rows — the main payload cost); a larger PR is truncated and flagged in the UI, while the impact banner still shows the true total. Empty = default (500); "0" disables.
maxDiffResources.title: maxDiffResources

mergeCommand.description: Optional Go text/template for the copy-to-merge command (only .Number / .Repo). Empty = forge default (gh/glab/tea). konflate never runs it.
mergeCommand.title: mergeCommand

prFilterExpr.description: CEL expression deciding which PRs konflate renders; must return a bool. Empty = `true` (every open PR). Forks are gated separately by `renderForkPrs`, so editing this can't enable forks. A PR it excludes is listed but hidden. e.g. `pr.labels.exists(l, l.name == "cluster/production") && !pr.draft`. See the README.
prFilterExpr.title: prFilterExpr

refreshInterval.description: How often each open PR re-renders / the PR list reconciles, as a missed-webhook backstop (Go duration).
refreshInterval.title: refreshInterval

renderConcurrency.description: Advanced: cap on reconcile goroutines within one render. Empty/"0" = auto (NumCPU*4).
renderConcurrency.title: renderConcurrency

renderForkPrs.description: Render fork PRs. ⚠️ A fork runs untrusted external code through flate (SSRF / resource exhaustion). Off by default — forks are listed but hidden until you flip this. Kept separate from `prFilterExpr` so the filter can't accidentally enable them.
renderForkPrs.title: renderForkPrs

repo.description: (required) Forge URI of the repository to review (github://owner/repo, gitlab://group/repo, forgejo://host/owner/repo).
repo.title: repo

sourceRetryAttempts.description: Advanced: tries per source fetch on transient network errors. Empty = default (3); "1" disables retry.
sourceRetryAttempts.title: sourceRetryAttempts

stageCacheMb.description: Advanced: persistent kustomize stage cache in MiB. Empty = default (2048); "0" disables size-based eviction.
stageCacheMb.title: stageCacheMb

config.title: config

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

httpRoute.description: Gateway API HTTPRoute — an alternative to `ingress` for exposing the UI; renders one route to the UI service port. Named `httpRoute` (not `route`) to avoid confusion with the OpenShift Route kind.

additionalRules.description: Custom rules prepended before the default rule (templated).
additionalRules.title: additionalRules

apiVersion.description: HTTPRoute apiVersion; empty defaults to gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1.
apiVersion.title: apiVersion

enabled.description: Expose the UI via a Gateway API HTTPRoute (alternative to ingress).
enabled.title: enabled

filters.description: Filters applied to the default rule.
filters.title: filters

hostnames.description: Hostnames matched against the Host header (templated).
hostnames.title: hostnames

httpsRedirect.description: Redirect HTTP→HTTPS (301) instead of routing to the backend (needs HTTP+HTTPS listeners).
httpsRedirect.title: httpsRedirect

kind.description: HTTPRoute kind; empty defaults to HTTPRoute.
kind.title: kind

matches.description: Match conditions for the default rule.
matches.title: matches

parentRefs.description: Gateways (and listeners) this route attaches to.
parentRefs.title: parentRefs

httpRoute.title: httpRoute

digest.description: Pin the image by digest (sha256:…); when set, overrides the tag.
digest.title: digest

tag.description: Overrides the image tag; defaults to the chart appVersion.
tag.title: tag

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private registries.
imagePullSecrets.title: imagePullSecrets

enabled.description: Expose the UI via an Ingress.
enabled.title: enabled

enabled.description: Create a Prometheus Operator ServiceMonitor (requires its CRDs).
enabled.title: enabled

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names.
nameOverride.title: nameOverride

networkPolicy.description:
NetworkPolicy for konflate (off by default). konflate must reach the forge API
plus the OCI/Helm/git sources a PR declares to render, so the policy *shapes*
egress to DNS + HTTPS rather than locking it down — still blocking lateral
access to other cluster services on other ports — and limits ingress to
konflate's own HTTP + metrics ports. Pick the flavor matching your CNI; the
Cilium/Calico variants render that CNI's CRD, so validate against your cluster.

allowDNS.description: Allow DNS egress (UDP/TCP 53). konflate must resolve forge/registry/git hosts to render, so leave this on unless DNS is handled out-of-band.
allowDNS.title: allowDNS

egressPorts.description: TCP ports konflate may egress to fetch sources during a render (forge API + git/OCI/Helm over HTTPS). Add 80 / 22 for plain-HTTP or SSH git sources.
egressPorts.title: egressPorts

type.description: Policy flavor for your CNI: "default" (networking.k8s.io/v1 NetworkPolicy), "cilium" (CiliumNetworkPolicy), or "calico" (projectcalico.org/v3 NetworkPolicy).
type.title: type

networkPolicy.title: networkPolicy

persistence.description: Persist konflate's state across restarts: the flate source caches, the bare git mirror, and the rendered diffs themselves. With diffs persisted, open PRs reload showing their last render (re-rendering only if the head advanced) and the recently-merged shelf survives at all (see `config.closedPr*`). Disabled, everything lives in an emptyDir and is rebuilt or lost on each restart. Recommended for any non-trivial repo.

enabled.description: Persist caches, the git mirror, and rendered diffs across restarts: open PRs reload instantly and the merged shelf survives. Recommended for any non-trivial repo.
enabled.title: enabled

existingClaim.description: Use an existing PVC instead of creating one.
existingClaim.title: existingClaim

persistence.title: persistence

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level securityContext (runs as non-root uid/gid 65532 with the RuntimeDefault seccomp profile).
podSecurityContext.title: podSecurityContext

replicaCount.description: Number of konflate replicas (it's stateless behind the Service).
replicaCount.title: replicaCount

resources.description: Pod resource requests/limits. The memory limit is the hard ceiling: it drives GOMEMLIMIT (90%) so the GC reclaims before the kernel OOM-kills a runaway render. Default bounds memory out of the box; raise it for very large clusters.
resources.title: resources

secret.description: Sensitive settings — a forge token plus inbound webhook/push secrets (all empty = anonymous, read-only mode).

existingSecret.description: Existing Secret holding the KONFLATE_* keys; takes precedence over the inline values below.
existingSecret.title: existingSecret

token.description: Forge API token. Empty = anonymous, read-only mode.
token.title: token

secret.title: secret

securityContext.description: Container securityContext (no privilege escalation, read-only root filesystem, drops ALL capabilities).
securityContext.title: securityContext

automount.description: Automount the ServiceAccount API token (off by default: konflate talks to forges, not the cluster API).
automount.title: automount

name.description: ServiceAccount name; generated from the release name if empty.
name.title: name

tests.description: Config for the chart's `helm test` hook — a one-shot pod that curls the Service's /readyz to prove the release serves. Used only by `helm test`, never the workload.

repository.description: `helm test` pod image; needs a shell with wget (konflate's own image is distroless).
repository.title: repository

tests.title: tests

volumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts on the container.
volumeMounts.title: volumeMounts
